name: sbc
description: Single-board-computer mechanical reference (Raspberry Pi Model-B family + Raspberry Pi Zero family + BananaPi BPI-R4): board outline, corner radius, PCB thickness, mounting-hole coordinates, connector footprints, placeholder envelope, and hole/cutout stamp modules.
sources: https://datasheets.raspberrypi.com/rpizero/raspberry-pi-zero-mechanical-drawing.pdf (Raspberry Pi Zero / Zero W / Zero WH)

https://forum.banana-pi.org/t/case-design-for-the-bpi-r4/19122 (community BPI-R4 case-design thread, read directly, corroborates real-world case-mounting practice for the bpir4 structural-mount hole classification; does not itself dimension hole positions)

https://makerworld.com/en/models/1316335-case-for-banana-pi-bpi-r4-wall-mounting-option (BPI-R4 wall-mount case listing; primary source not accessed (HTTP 403), cited from a product listing summary, not independently read)
https://forum.banana-pi.org/t/3d-printable-bpi-r4-case/17324 (community BPI-R4 case thread; from a search listing summary only, not independently read)
https://openelab.io/products/bpi-r4-lite-aluminum-case (BPI-R4 Lite variant metal case; product listing, not independently verified)
https://openelab.io/products/bpi-r4-lite-iron-case (BPI-R4 Lite variant metal case; product listing, not independently verified)
https://youyeetoo.com/products/banana-pi-r4-metal-case (standard BPI-R4 metal case; product listing, not independently verified)
https://www.amazon.com/WayPonDEV-BPI-R4-Router-Board-OpenWRT/dp/B0D2DDVGY3 (standard BPI-R4 bundled metal case; product listing, not independently verified)
